SK Hynix It’s a move that aims to cement the nation’s overwhelming industry leadership.Lee was joined for the announcement by the leaders of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix.Shell unveiled a small electric concept car that it says can recharge in under 10 minutes.It uses a special cooling fluid to help stop the battery overheating.Shell said the car, called the Triple 10 Challenge, charged from 10% to 80% in 9 minutes and 54 seconds on a 175 kW public fast charger.It describes the car as a road-worthy proof-of-concept vehicle.Toby Rockstroh is energy application testing manager at Shell Technology Center. "When we looked at battery electric vehicles, they're getting bigger and larger and heavier, so we set ourselves the challenge saying we can have a smaller battery electric vehicle that can charge fast and be convenient,"
